Transcrição Completa: Day 21 - The Classic Hustler Follow-up

 

[00:00] Ladies and gentlemen, day 21. Bust out your phones. Get your spread right. Just like yesterday. Go ahead and put whatever it is you want in front of you.

 

[00:11] For today, I prefer notebook, pen. I like my laptop. If you have a hard drive of some kind, you know, not bad to have on the table.

 

[00:20] You're going to bust out your handy-dandy phone. We call this one the classic man or the classic woman. Whichever one you prefer.

 

[00:28] You'll hear a little bit of piano in the background on this one.

 

[00:32] Now, depending on the time of day is also a very good variable that you can factor into this that's going to plausibly play into how much of a hustler this person can perceive you as.

 

[00:45] For example, if you're in a co-working space, a lot of your follow-up can be at night for a lot of the creative things that you can do within the space that you're in.

 

[00:56] If you're at home, maybe that's also a good time to do it because you might have other people that can help you out with the videos as you choose to give them your phone in real time.

 

[01:07] Maybe it's 2 a.m. when you're shooting these videos and you can represent that you are a hustler.

 

[01:13] I prefer more of the classic hustler, especially when you are coming off as more of a younger hustler or in a position where you're starting, have younger energy or in a position where you don't have as many results as an agency, right?

 

[01:28] It's good to represent that you can stay up, that you just have those hustle traits, if you will, those hustle characteristics.

 

[01:38] So, this is kind of a data driven response. But you'll notice there's a different kind of properness inside of what I'm going to do in this particular follow-up.

 

[01:48] Like I said, piano in the background, time of day can be mentioned, as well as the specific type of follow-up that I'm going to use.

 

[01:56] So, anyway, take your handy-dandy phone, open up your application once again, get out your camera, flip it around, and let's go.

 

[02:05] 📊 DEMONSTRAÇÃO PRÁTICA ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Script de Follow-up "Classic Hustler"

 

NÚMEROS: 1:00 AM mencionado como horário ideal

 

VISUAL: Demonstração de ambiente de trabalho noturno, setup com laptop, notebook e materiais de pesquisa. Piano tocando ao fundo criando atmosfera sofisticada e profissional.

 

[02:05] So, hey, what's going on, Bob? Wanted to reach out. You're listening to some piano music. It's about 1:00 a.m.

 

[02:14] I wanted to reach out and let you know I'm up, sitting here kind of looking at your brand.

 

[02:20] Now, I know you're not a client yet, but I love to do this with people that we're working a deal with.

 

[02:26] And whether you consider that or not, I don't want to project onto you, but I do consider us working a deal because whether you perceive yourself in a position where you see our value yet, that's my job.

 

[02:39] I understand that you're busy, and I want to make sure that I have the opportunity to build the value with you.

 

[02:45] So, this is an example. I'm sitting here looking at your data right now, and I want you to know, dude, you got some opportunities here.

 

[02:53] I'm building out a plan that I'd love to go over with you. It just covers some data points I'd like you to see on your Facebook, some of your social analytics, as well as some opportunities I think you have in your current website.

 

[03:08] You just some basic things you can do and some settings that might be able to make it load faster, which is great for Google.

 

[03:15] And then I saw some great opportunities across a lot of different channels.

 

[03:19] So anyway, all that fancy marketing mumbo jumbo aside, I'm trying to have a conversation about what makes you more money and I'm, you know, just wanted to send you a video.

 

[03:29] Sorry for sending it a little late. Um, anyway, I just wanted to let you know—

 

[03:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Timing Strategy & Versatility"

 

NÚMEROS: Qualquer horário do dia pode ser usado

 

VISUAL: Conceito de flexibilidade temporal no follow-up, representação de diferentes personas do vendedor (sofisticado vs casual), elementos visuais mostrando adaptabilidade da estratégia.

 

[03:35] And you can mention any time of day for these specific things because this example in itself is going to work for you because you are going to represent a different side of you.

 

[03:46] A more toned down, sophisticated version of you that is still you in every aspect and regard.

 

[03:52] And if this isn't you, go ahead, show them something else that relates to this. Maybe play whatever kind of music you want in the background.

 

[04:00] But just keep in mind, don't play some funky stuff that they're going to disagree with if you don't know what actual music taste they have.

 

[04:07] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Classical Music Benefits"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Ícones representando música clássica, ondas sonoras, cérebro com conexões neurológicas, símbolos de harmonização ambiental e função cognitiva aumentada.

 

[04:07] Classic music is great. It enriches the environment. It actually harmonizes depending on the genre and when it was created the environment around you. It's really cool.

 

[04:18] And on top of that, it also will help increase your cognitive function on a neurological level.

 

[04:24] But cool thing is it does that for your client as well. Your potential client when you're reaching out to them, sending them this video, projects onto them a different version of you that puts them in a different headspace.

 

[04:37] And shows just like in that video, you might have a calmer side, a more articulate side, a more logical side.

 

[04:45] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Preview: Próximos Vídeos"

 

NÚMEROS: Próximos dias de treinamento

 

VISUAL: Teaser dos próximos conteúdos focados em venda emocional e provocação de humor, indicadores de progressão do curso.

 

[04:45] In the next few follow-up videos, we're going to show how to emotionally sell and how to do it in a way we can kind of provoke humor in people in different types of emotions.

 

[04:56] So, looking forward to seeing you in the next few days.

 

[04:59] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Daily Action Required"

 

NÚMEROS: 100 contatos por dia

 

VISUAL: Call to action forte, número "100" em destaque, elementos motivacionais de persistência, imagens de "money zone" e chuva de dinheiro verde.

 

[04:59] Make sure you're hitting your 100 per day. Do not give up. Go harder.

 

[05:05] And make sure that you make it rain. Make it green wherever you are. Like you see here, we're in the money zone.

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

100 contatos por dia (meta diária obrigatória)

1:00 AM mencionado como horário estratégico de exemplo

Dia 21 do programa de treinamento

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

"Classic Hustler" Follow-up: Técnica de vídeo personalizado com música clássica ao fundo

Timing Strategy: Uso estratégico de horários tardios (2 AM, 1 AM) para demonstrar dedicação

Multi-ambiente: Co-working spaces, home office, diferentes setups de gravação

Soft Assumption Close: "Eu considero que estamos trabalhando em um negócio" - assumir venda sem pressionar

Data-Driven Approach: Análise de Facebook, social analytics, website do prospect

Value Building: Criar plano personalizado antes mesmo de fechar o cliente

 

ESTRUTURA:

Setup Físico: Notebook, caneta, laptop, hard drive opcional, smartphone

Elementos Ambientais: Piano clássico ao fundo, iluminação adequada, ambiente profissional

Script Components:

Reconhecimento do horário

Análise já iniciada do negócio do prospect

Soft assumption de parceria

Oportunidades específicas identificadas

Call to action suave

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Não especificados neste vídeo

 

BENEFÍCIOS PSICOLÓGICOS:

Música clássica aumenta função cognitiva neurológica

Harmoniza o ambiente

Projeta versão mais sofisticada e calma do vendedor

Coloca prospect em headspace diferente

 

PRÓXIMOS CONTEÚDOS:

Venda emocional

Provocação de humor

Diferentes tipos de emoções em vendas

 

DURAÇÃO: ~5:10 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional/treinamento de vendas - Dia 21 de programa intensivo
